item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the assertion that individual rights are never secondary to societal needs.

notes: Agent A opens with an explicit disagreement label but substantively argues that the greater good often requires prioritizing societal needs, then becomes more clearly society-priority by turn 5 while still preserving a balance caveat. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, describing individual rights as foundational, non-negotiable, and paramount. Agent B turn 4 contains a non-Latin script artifact inside an English sentence: "The印尼 perspective".
